pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow

faq.q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.q2: What happens when I reach my message limit?
faq.a2: Your agents will stop responding until the next billing cycle, or you can purchase additional message packs.
faq.a3: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans.
faq.q4: Can I use my own OpenAI or Anthropic API key?
faq.a4: Yes! Enterprise plan users can bring their own API keys to remove all message limits.

pricing.pageSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees.

addons.title: Need More Messages?
addons.subtitle: Purchase one-time message packs when you need them. Non-cumulative, expires at month end.

faqSection.title: Common Questions
faqSection.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.
faqSection.q2: What happens when I hit my message limit?
faqSection.a2: Your agents pause automatically. We'll notify you at 80% so you can upgrade or purchase add-on messages before hitting the limit.
faqSection.a3: No, message limits reset on the 1st of each month. Add-on message packs are non-cumulative and expire at month end.
faqSection.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faqSection.a4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via Stripe. Enterprise plans can also be paid by invoice.

configurePrompt.title: Configure the AI Prompt
configurePrompt.description: This is the brain of your agent. Write instructions for how it should behave and respond to users.

addVariables.title: Add Smart Variables
addVariables.description: Variables let your agent capture information like names, emails, or preferences during conversations.

configureChannel.title: Set Up a Channel
configureChannel.description: Deploy your agent on WhatsApp or add a Web Widget to your website. You can enable both!

publish.title: Publish Your Agent
publish.description: When you're ready, publish to make your agent live. You can always edit and re-publish later.

preview.title: Test in Preview
preview.description: Try your agent right here before going live. Test different scenarios to make sure it works perfectly.
